user_query: I'm putting together my expense report. What are the most expensive restaurants I've booked?

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 2 > Alo Restaurant

node_data.name: Alo Restaurant
node_data.description: Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Alo Restaurant has the highest expected_cost (CAD 300-400) and is described as extremely expensive Michelin three-star fine dining.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 5 > Kaiseki Kaji

node_data.name: Kaiseki Kaji
node_data.description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Kaiseki Kaji has the next-highest expected_cost (CAD 250-350) and is explicitly described as very expensive omakase.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > Canoe Restaurant

node_data.name: Canoe Restaurant
node_data.description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Canoe Restaurant has the third-highest expected_cost (CAD 150-200) and is described as expensive fine dining with upscale amenities.
